Here is a summary of all `/api/congress/*` endpoints in `/mnt/data/hello-world/serve.py`:

---

### GET endpoints

**`GET /api/congress/identities`**
Returns a JSON array of all persona definitions from `agents/active/` and `agents/fired/`. Each entry includes: `name`, `role`, `traits`, `evolves`, `model`, `display_name`, `avatar_url`, `title`, `sex`, `status` (`"active"` or `"severance"`). Personas with `congress: false` in frontmatter are excluded.
